'''Drayneen''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] member of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]].

==Biography==
With her charm and beauty, Drayneen was able to learn countless secrets and excelled at pulling information from captured [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] by making them believe that she was on their side. She was also well known for being disliked by her counterparts in [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]]. Most operatives from the organization were afraid of her ability to easily coerce almost anyone.<ref name="Rebellion Era Sourcebook" />

== Personality and traits ==
Drayneen was one of the few members of the Inquisitorius to be female. She was subtle and ruthless, however, during interrogation she was manipulative and seductive, usually strongly portraying confidence and empathy, this often caused her prisoners to like her initally with them even hoping to make her happy. It is only late in an interrogation that she allows her true cruelty and power to take hold. Despite her talent and effectiveness in interrogating, some Intelligence officers refused to call upon her due to her habit of both scaring and exciting them while working.<ref name="Rebellion Era Sourcebook" />

==Powers and abilities==
As an Inquisitor, Drayneen had many talents in the Force such as the ability to [[Mind trick/Legends|affect ones mind]], [[Force sense/Legends|enhance her senses]], [[Mind trick/Legends#Force fear|inflict fear]], [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Grip|grip her enemies]], [[Tutaminis|defend herself through the Force]], [[Force stealth|hide her allignment in the force]], [[Sense Force|determine the magnitude and allignment of an area, person, or object]], and [[Telepathy/Legends|communicate telepathicly]]. Outside of her abilities, she was able to speak, understand, and write in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. She was equipped with a [[Force pike/Legends|force pike]], [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], an [[encrypted comlink]], a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]], and a [[Force artifact/Legends|Force talisman]]. She was most proficent with blaster pistols and primitive and simple weapons.<ref name="Rebellion Era Sourcebook" />
